translations.bld.f.goalPh: e.g. Turn vague requests into clear, actionable plans
translations.bld.f.toolsHint: Calls tools · add/edit under Tools Manager (Admin)
translations.bld.f.wfHint: Automated job sets the agent can run
translations.bld.f.docsHint: Open full-page editor / download / add new file
translations.bld.f.coreHint: Every agent must have these — can't delete/edit
translations.bld.f.rulesHint: Applied when they don't conflict with core rules
translations.bld.f.statusNote: Starts as “idle” · the system updates it from real activity

translations.compare.title: Compare Content
translations.compare.desc: Production's sitemap is the source of truth — each primary URL is mapped onto UAT and both sides are checked for coverage.
translations.compare.mode.label: Compare mode
translations.compare.sort.label: Sort
translations.compare.mode.coverageNote: Production's sitemap drives the URL set; each path is checked on UAT (same-structure sites).
translations.compare.mode.pairNote: Compare two exact page URLs directly — even different sites. Full deep diff of text, meta, images, links.
translations.compare.pair.title: Page A ↔ Page B — differences
translations.compare.deep.unfetchable: Couldn't fetch one or both pages (blocked, error, or not HTML). Open them in a new tab.
translations.compare.needUrls: Enter both the Production and UAT base URLs first
translations.compare.err.network: Couldn't reach the server, or the run took too long. Check the backend is running (start.bat); for a large site, try again or compare fewer URLs.
translations.compare.err.auth: Your session expired or you are not authorized. Please sign in again.
translations.compare.err.sitemap: Could not read the sitemap — check the URL is reachable and returns valid XML.
translations.compare.err.input: Check the Production and UAT URLs are valid (include https://).
translations.compare.dir.label: Direction
translations.compare.dir.note: {src}'s sitemap is the source of truth; each URL is checked on {tgt}.
translations.compare.runningDeep: Deep comparing… (this can take a while)
translations.compare.deep.toggle: Deep compare (body · title · meta · images · links)
translations.compare.deep.note: Fetches full HTML of each page on both sides — heavier; for big sites lower the page count.
translations.compare.auth.title: This site requires login
translations.compare.auth.detected: {n} page(s) returned 401/403 — the site needs login. Enter credentials and we'll retry both sides.
translations.compare.auth.detectedPair: A page returned 401/403 — it needs login. Page A = Production tab, Page B = UAT tab. Enter credentials and we'll retry.
translations.compare.auth.hint: Use Basic auth (Windows / .htpasswd login) or paste a session header / cookie. Sent only to the target host; never stored.
translations.compare.deep.bodyDiff: Body diff (green = added on target, red = removed)
translations.compare.deep.jump: Open the live page here — scrolls to & highlights this text
translations.compare.deep.jumpHint: click a block → opens it on the live page
translations.compare.statusHint: Status = whether the URL is reachable on both sides. Content differences are shown in the Deep column.
translations.compare.deep.blkSame: Content blocks match — only minor whitespace/formatting differs
translations.compare.deep.unfetchableHint: The batch request didn't complete (slow site or network). Try the 🔬 Deep button on this row, or open the pages.
translations.compare.deep.bodyTooBig: Body too long to diff inline — showing similarity only
translations.compare.toast.deepNoNew: ✓ Already deep-compared everything requested — nothing new to fetch
translations.compare.toast.pairDiff: The two pages differ — see the details
translations.compare.empty.title: No URLs found
translations.compare.empty.sub: Production's sitemap returned no URLs to compare
translations.compare.noMatchSub: Try another category or clear the search
translations.compare.cache.stale: Inputs changed — run again for fresh data.
translations.compare.sites.label: Saved sites
translations.compare.sites.empty: No saved sites yet — fill the URLs, then Save current.
translations.compare.sites.title: Saved sites
translations.compare.sites.name: Name
translations.compare.sites.credNote: Credentials (incl. passwords) are stored in this browser only (localStorage) — local dev convenience, never synced.

translations.hall.title: Overview
translations.hall.desc: An overview of your agents' work — the council is powered by HERMES
translations.hall.help: Quick guide: 🟢 Connected to real AI = actually works (HERMES chat in World State, Recall) · 💾 Saved locally = data stored on device (agents, map, knowledge) · ◌ Demo = numbers/chat for show only, no effect
translations.hall.empty.roster: No agents in the system yet
translations.hall.empty.rosterSub: Create your first agent — set name, role, skills and rules

translations.alerts.failed.title: Tasks failed

translations.alerts.away.title: Agents not ready
translations.floor.empty: The tower is empty — summon agents to staff it
translations.agents.title: All agents
translations.agents.desc: Your system's AI agent team — create and define each one's name, role, skills and rules
translations.agents.help: Characters you create are saved for real and appear on the world map · name/role/skills/rules are character profiles — not yet wired to a real AI
translations.agents.empty: No agents in the system yet
translations.agents.emptySub: Create your first agent — set name, role, skills and rules, or start from the sample set
translations.tools.title: Manage Tools
translations.tools.desc: The system's central tool catalog — add / edit / disable here, and the agent builder always sees the latest list
translations.tools.help: Each tool has its own type + settings (MCP · LINE OA · Telegram · CMD/PowerShell · HTTP API · Webhook · Database · Email) — turn off the switch to hide it from the agent builder without deleting it
translations.tools.emptySub: Click 'Add tool' to create the first one
translations.tools.addPosPh: Add a new position e.g. Analyst
translations.tools.skillMdPh: What this skill does and when to use it…
translations.tools.delSkillMsg: Delete skill “{name}”? Agents using it will lose it.
translations.tools.delToolMsg: Remove "{name}" from the system? Agents using it will have this tool detached
translations.toolform.name: Tool name
translations.pw.title: Change password
translations.pw.errShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
translations.profile.title: Account
translations.profile.name: Display name
translations.notif.title: Notifications
translations.meeting.title: Agent Council
translations.meeting.desc: A real-time system council — all agents coordinate under HERMES's lead
translations.meeting.help: The chat here is a scripted demo for atmosphere, not wired to a real AI yet — to talk to a real AI go to 'World State' or 'Recall'
translations.ad.delMsg: Remove {name} from the roster? (The profile is kept and can be restored later.)
translations.ad.ceoLocked: 👔 Agent CEO is a fixed role — can't be deleted by anyone (including admins)
translations.ad.ceoLockedAlert: Agent CEO is a fixed role and can't be deleted by anyone (including the administrator)
translations.qb.title: Quest board
translations.qb.desc: Assign and track every agent's work — set the responsible room, priority and status
translations.qb.recallTitle: Pull the task back to continue
translations.qb.openTitle: Open task — view details and the AI worklog
translations.qb.empty.trashSub: Deleted tasks rest here first — restorable
translations.qb.create.title: Create a new quest
translations.qb.f.name: Task name
translations.qb.edit.title: Edit task
translations.qb.bumpedNote: This task was bumped to the front — priority is set to 'Top priority' and locked
translations.qb.queueNote: Queue and time follow the real task order — not editable; the AI runs by queue
translations.qb.finishMsgDone: Task “{title}” completed all {step}/{total} steps — confirm closing it?
translations.qb.finishMsgEarly: Task “{title}” isn't done — currently at {step}/{total} steps. Close it early?
translations.qb.warnDone: Press confirm again to close this task
translations.qb.warnEarly: The AI isn't finished ({step}/{total}) — closing now stops the pending work. Press confirm again to close
translations.qb.creatingMsg: HERMES is issuing the code and preparing the task room
translations.qb.softDelMsg: Move task “{title}” to trash? All files are kept — restorable later
translations.qb.purgeMsg: Delete task “{title}” permanently? Both .md files{room} will be lost — can't be undone
translations.qb.purgeRoomFrag: and the room bound to it
translations.lib.title: Component library
translations.lib.desc: The real PiKaOs components the app ships with — all rendered live, interactive, and theme-aware
translations.lib.lt.hint: Click any glyph to make it wobble
translations.lib.spec.type: Letters3D (Mitr 700, stroke-behind-fill) · IBM Plex Sans Thai (UI) · JetBrains Mono (kicker/code)
translations.lib.t.title: Page heading / Page title
translations.lib.t.body: Body text — easy to read at 14px, line-height 1.65
translations.lib.spec.buttons: Button — kind: gold/ghost/danger · size sm · icon · loading · disabled · 3D base shadow, sinks & springs back
translations.lib.spec.dropdown: Spring menu .96→1 · indigo tick bounce · MultiSelect with counter + ✓ box
translations.lib.spec.inputs: Focus = indigo border + 3px ring · error = red ring + helper text
translations.lib.spec.fc: Checkbox — ✓ bounce · Switch — knob stretches on press then springs across · Segmented — white pill + indigo text
translations.lib.spec.badges: tint recipe — bg 9–14% / border 35–45% · urgent = solid crimson, white text
translations.lib.spec.tabs: segmented pill — active option gets a white bg + raised shadow
translations.lib.spec.progress: Progress — fill springs to value, green at 100% · Spinner 15px
translations.lib.spec.feedback: toast pops bottom-right, gone in 3s · modal pop .9→1 over a blurred backdrop · tooltip springs from below
translations.lib.fb.modalBody: This is a Modal from the component kit — press Esc or click the backdrop to close
translations.lib.sp.warningMsg: Your token quota is almost full
translations.lib.sp.infoMsg: The system goes down for maintenance tonight at 02:00
translations.lib.spec.text: fmt-toolbar B/I/U + align · mark.hl tints gold/emerald/crimson/amethyst 16–18%
translations.lib.txt.sample: Type a sample sentence, then try B / I / U
translations.lib.spec.tags: type then Enter to add a tag (chip-pop) · spring calendar, today = gold ring, selected = gold pill
translations.lib.spec.softDelete: 🗑 → countdown confirm → soft delete (strikethrough + Undo 5s) → permanent delete
translations.lib.spec.todo: tick → green fill + strikethrough · live counter + progress · Enter adds an item
translations.lib.todo.title: Today's tasks
translations.lib.spec.search: focus opens results (spring) · live filter + match highlight · ↑/↓ to move, Enter to pick
translations.lib.si.1.title: New agent onboarding guide
translations.lib.si.2.title: Login bug on mobile
translations.lib.si.3.title: Oi, analyst
translations.lib.si.4.title: Monthly token report
translations.lib.spec.filter: search + MultiSelect facets · removable filter chips + clear all · match counter
translations.lib.fr.1.title: Review database schema
translations.lib.fr.2.title: Write the invoice API
translations.lib.fr.3.title: Competitor research summary
translations.lib.fr.4.title: Regression test v0.2
translations.lib.spec.notif: bell + unread counter · spring panel · assign rows have Accept/Decline · Mark all read
translations.lib.ni.1.text: Requesting approval of the database schema before implementation
translations.lib.ext.desc: Built on top of the core PiKaOs kit — exactly the same design language
translations.lib.spec.toolRows: Used on the ‘Tools manager’ page (MCP · LINE OA · Telegram · CMD …)
translations.lib.spec.rich: Used on every Body field: SKILL.md, Codex content · toolbar B/I/H1/H2/list/code
translations.lib.rich.content: Type your content here — you can format it
translations.lib.spec.overlays: The ones the app really calls — uiConfirm (delete + countdown) · uiLoading (walker) · pushNotify (task bell)
translations.lib.ov.confirmMsg: Move this item to trash? You can restore it later
translations.lib.ov.notifyQ: May I get approval on the database schema before I start implementing?
translations.lib.spec.loading: pixel walker (40-frame sprite, steps(40)) + progress · closes itself when done
translations.lib.load.title: Loading your workspace…
translations.lib.spec.saveBar: Floating bottom bar — appears when there are unsaved edits · save/cancel · used on ‘Roles & permissions’
translations.world.lobbyDesc: Enter a room to view and decorate it · see an overview of who's doing what · chat with HERMES
translations.world.roomDesc: Top-down room — characters act out real work · sub-agents split off to help · tap 'Build mode' to arrange the room
translations.world.newRoomCardSub: Start from an empty room and arrange it yourself
translations.world.delRoomMsg: Delete room “{name}” permanently? The whole layout will be lost
translations.world.useTpl: Create a room from this template
translations.world.noTpl: No templates yet — enter a room and tap 'Save as template'
translations.world.soundTitle: Sound alert when an agent finishes a turn
translations.world.saveTplTitle: Save this room layout as a template
translations.world.viewOnlyTitle: Your role can't edit the room layout
translations.world.buildHint: Drag = paint floor/wall · click to place furniture · R to rotate · Ctrl+Z to undo · 'Erase' removes · autosaves
translations.world.viewHint: 👁️ View only — your role can't edit the room layout
translations.world.resetRoomMsg: Reset this room to default? (Removes all furniture and the layout)
translations.world.shared: Shared — used across the whole system
translations.world.noAgentRoom: No agents in this room yet
translations.ri.head: 🏠 Room info — linked to a task
translations.ri.noLink: This room isn't linked to a task yet — create a task on the board, then pick or create this room
translations.rx.head: 📤 Files the AI exported — Excel · JSON · CSV · etc.
translations.rx.empty: No exported files yet — tap 'Simulate AI export'
translations.rs.head: 🗂 Room sessions — a log of each work round
translations.rs.empty: No sessions yet — tap 'Save this session'
translations.rfile.PERSONA.md.d: One voice across the team — keeps outputs consistent
translations.rfile.WORKFLOW.md.d: Each agent knows where it sits in the work
translations.rfile.GLOSSARY.md.d: Same terms across the team — fewer hallucinations
translations.rfile.SKILL.md.d: Each agent can do something different
translations.rfile.TOOLS.md.d: No need to know tools it doesn't use
translations.world.ovNoAgent: No agents in this room yet
translations.world.ovNoMatch: No rooms or members match your search
translations.world.create.title: Create new room
translations.world.tplNote: Pick a template to create a room with a ready-made layout + furniture
translations.world.deptPermNote: Adding new departments is reserved for permitted roles
translations.world.ceoNote: Every room has an Agent CEO that dispatches work automatically — not editable
translations.world.saveTplPrompt.title: Save as template
translations.world.saveTplPrompt.msg: Name the template from this room layout
translations.world.savedMsg: Saved “{name}” as a template — use it to create new rooms from the 'Templates' tab
translations.mana.title: Tokens
translations.mana.desc: The energy that drives every agent — track token usage and how it's allocated across roles
translations.mana.capacityNote: Estimated to last ~26 more hours of pending work at the current burn rate
translations.mana.noUsageSub: Create an agent to start tracking usage
translations.treasury.title: Treasury
translations.treasury.desc: Rewards the team has accrued from completed tasks — credits and artifacts earned along the way

translations.chronicle.desc: A chronicle of the team's output — completed tasks, success rate, and weekly trends
translations.chronicle.noRankSub: Create an agent to start recording stats
translations.codex.title: Knowledge base
translations.codex.desc: The team's shared memory — documents, research and decision records · click an item to read the full content
translations.codex.help: This is the team's notebook — notes you add are saved on this device and searchable
translations.codex.noMatchSub: Try a different search, or add a new note
translations.codex.f.title: Title
translations.codex.f.tagsPh: Type a tag and press Enter
translations.qlog.title: Task history
translations.qlog.desc: A record of all the team's tasks — completed and in progress
translations.watch.title: Monitoring
translations.watch.desc: Health status of the team and the systems behind it — alerts when something's off
translations.set.title: Settings
translations.set.desc: Choose your display theme and vocabulary independently — changes apply instantly and are remembered on this device.
translations.set.scanNote: Scanned from data/i18n/*.json — 1 file = 1 language + 1 vocabulary style · add new files without touching code
translations.set.design.itemDesc: Browse the full PiKaOs component set — buttons, forms, badges, popups and 3D letters
translations.api.title: API connections
translations.api.desc: Add your AI provider API keys with a memorable name — the list shows only the name and the key's last digits (stored on this device)
